title: CLIFFHANGER — Ginger eyes mini-latch
prompt: Close-up in @dream-house. @Ginger sits in the foreground, head tilted, eyes locked on a tiny wooden latch on the front door of the Dream House. She lifts one paw, sniffing the tiny latch curiously. Ginger: "Woof?" Mischievous music sting, slight zoom-in. The Dream House behind her glows warmly.
